tests.description: A plain `try` around an abortable leaf inside a guard must not swallow the guard's trip. Newly correct as of Increment-2 guardId matching: the plain try owns no guards (no ownedGuardIds), so it re-throws the guardTrip; the guard's own boundary converts it -> 'guard:timeoutFailure'. Previously the inner try converted any guardTrip and the guard never tripped.
